# Wallly

> Free random video and text chat that connects strangers worldwide. Where the walls end, you find a friend.

Wallly is a modern Omegle/OmeTV alternative offering anonymous video chat, text chat, image sharing, interest-based matching, and community groups. Min age 16. Premium plans add gender/age filters, priority matching, virtual backgrounds, and more.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with product overview and how it works.
- [App](/app): The live random chat application (video + text).
- [Premium](/premium): Subscription tiers — Weekly ₹99, Monthly ₹299, Yearly ₹1999.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on online connection, safety, dating, and culture.
- [Communities](/c): Topic-based community groups.
- [Connections](/connections): Saved friends and chat history.
- [How To Use](/howtouse): Step-by-step usage guide.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.
- [Auth](/auth): Sign up and log in.
